arts.ttl: Manchester United make contact over signing Brighton player – AC Milan now also keen
arts.sum: Andre Onana this week stated Manchester United should beat Lyon in their Europa League tie, because the Red Devils are ‘way better’ than their French rivals. Whilst that may be true on paper, it’s clearly caused some annoyance around the Ligue 1 side and will provide added motivation ahead of the match this evening.
